query: SELECT m.id AS memberId, m.accountId, a.name AS accountName, a.slug AS accountSlug, a.status AS accountStatus, m.role AS memberRole, m.isActive FROM account_members m INNER JOIN accounts a ON m.accountId = a.id WHERE m.userId = 902504 AND m.isActive = 1;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nUtjHxifDnrEvTS.bc571705cde8 --database KNXKWFANWEUxWWEfuwT2Hr --execute SELECT m.id AS memberId, m.accountId, a.name AS accountName, a.slug AS accountSlug, a.status AS accountStatus, m.role AS memberRole, m.isActive FROM account_members m INNER JOIN accounts a ON m.accountId = a.id WHERE m.userId = 902504 AND m.isActive = 1;
